title: Module 1
content:
Linux Kernel: System Memory
Management,
Software Program
Management, Hardware Management, Filesystem Management.
Linux Desktop Environment: The X Window System, KDE Desktop,
GNOME Desktop, Unity Desktop.
Linux Distributions: Core Linux Distributions, Specialized Linux
Distributions

title: Module 2
content:
Shell :Reaching the Command Line, Console Terminals , Graphical
Terminals, Accessing CLI via a Linux Console Terminal, Accessing CLI via
Graphical Terminal Emulation, Using the GNOME Terminal Emulator,
Accessing the GNOME Terminal, Using the xterm Terminal Emulator,
Accessing xterm.

title: Module 3
content:
Basic Shell Commands: Starting the Shell, Using the Shell Prompt,
Interacting with the bash Manual, Looking at the Linux file system,
Traversing directories, Listing Files and Directories, Handling Files,
Copying files, Deleting files, Creating directories, Deleting directories.
Linux Security: Removing a user, Modifying a user, Using file permission
symbols, Default file permissions, Changing permissions, Changing
ownership, Sharing Files.

title: Module 4
content:
Vim Editor:  Introduction to vim Features, Command Mode: Moving the
Cursor, Input Mode, Command Mode: Deleting and Changing Text, Reading
and Writing Files.
Python scripting: Data structures, modules, inputs and outputs, Floating
Point Arithmetic: Issues and Limitations.
